hooks.command: echo '[recordatorio] Si esta sesion tuvo descubrimientos de dominio, decisiones o alternativas descartadas, considera escribir field notes en docs/bitacora/field-notes/ antes de continuar.'

jq -r 'if (.tool_input.command // "") | test("dotnet test") then "[" + (now | strftime("%H:%M:%S")) + "][test] " + (if (.tool_result // "") | test("passed|Passed|Superado|Correctas") then "PASS" else "FAIL" end) else empty end' 2>/dev/null | tee -a .claude/pipeline/events.log 2>/dev/null || true

jq -r 'if (.tool_input.command // "") | test("terraform (plan|apply|init|validate)") then "[" + (now | strftime("%H:%M:%S")) + "][terraform] " + ((.tool_input.command | split(" ") | .[1]) // "?") + ": " + (if (.tool_result.exitCode // 0) == 0 then "OK" else "ERROR" end) else empty end' 2>/dev/null | tee -a .claude/pipeline/events.log 2>/dev/null || true
